notes:
This printer is reported to be a rebadged Lexmark 5700, working with the appropriate drivers.

The Compaq cartridges have a little plastic tab to make them incompatible with Lexmark cartridges. Otherwise they are the same. I think you can break off the tab and use the other brand?

Consumables/Refills: color and black or photo cart.

drivers.name: lex5700
drivers.comments:
This driver is available in the Ghostscript Printer Application

Henryk's Ghostscript driver for the 5700 and related Lexmark Color Jetprinters.

Fast and less memory consuming alternative to the "pbm2l7k" colour driver. You should have it installed when you do not only use your printer for images but also for letters and listings.

This driver is not maintained any more, but it is part of ESP Ghostscript. So install ESP Ghostscript to get the driver.
